name: on transmit_return
title: on transmit_return
description: This handler is called whenever a provided method member transmits a return via the CAPL binding.
If the member does not use the CAPL binding, the handler is ignored.

If there are multiple handlers for the same member, the measurement will be aborted. Inside the handler the this expression refers to the call context of the call (i.e. it is of type callContext <Member>).
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
